rationale: Educ. Code §8.102 governs data reporting by regional education service centers. It is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Each regional education service center shall report audited or budgeted financial information and any other information requested by the commissioner for use in assessing the performance of the center.
_note: Rule text concerns education service center data reporting; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
